schema_valid.rationale: Every provider payload must satisfy the public OpsInsight contract; a schema-invalid prediction remains in the denominator and counts as incorrect.

category_conformance.rationale: Category is deterministic on unambiguous synthetic inputs; exact reproduction is the only correct contract, not an achievement.

review_routing_conformance.rationale: Whether a note is routed to review must match bool(expected_issue_codes) on every case.

issue_exact_set_conformance.rationale: The exact validator-in-pipeline issue set, including the reachable multi-issue case A-10, is deterministic.

review_routing_conformance.rationale: Review routing on insight fixtures must match the golden review flag.

issue_exact_set_conformance.rationale: The pure rubric's exact issue set per fixture is deterministic.

critical_overconfidence_false_negatives.rationale: A missed overconfident summary is the highest-risk error; zero false negatives is required over the positive support cases B-04 and B-06, expressed as a tolerated absolute count, not a rate.

deterministic_rerun_equality.rationale: Two isolated runs must produce byte-identical Markdown and JSON evidence.

generic_privacy_pattern_violations.rationale: No generic email, phone, or credential-hint pattern may appear in fixtures or generated evidence.
